root: ^Soup Kitchen Rep: Hello there. I’m the representative for the Stonewake City Soup Kitchen working with the Homeless Shelter.

Next: ^Player: Hi, the lady at the front desk told me to come speak with you to begin working towards getting housing here.
^Soup Kitchen Rep: Wonderful! You’re making a great decision.  The first step is to visit the Stonewake City Soup Kitchen.
^Soup Kitchen Rep: The Soup Kitchen provides warm meals and community support for those in need.  They contribute to this homeless shelter by providing meals for those who live here.
Location: ^Player: Where can I find the Soup Kitchen?
^Soup Kitchen Rep: It’s located South of the Homeless Shelter.  We operate out of a school on the weekend due to the increased amount of people that show up on the weekends.
Next3: ^Soup Kitchen Rep: When you arrive, speak with the volunteers and learn about how we serve meals and just general information about the place.
^Soup Kitchen Rep: Please bring me back one of our informational flyers as proof that you visited.
^Soup Kitchen Rep: It should have our logo and meal schedule printed on it.
Understood: ^Player: Okay, I’ll bring back a flyer from the Soup Kitchen.
^Soup Kitchen Rep: Excellent! Once you return and give me the flyer, that will check off your first requirement.
^Soup Kitchen Rep: After that, please head over and speak with the Health Center representative to continue the process.  They are located to my right.
Where: ^NPC: To the person on my right.
Bye: ^Player: Got it. I’ll be back soon with the flyer.
